patch.value: Implementation task for pm-rl4e. Includes PM tracking updates, code changes, docs, tests, verification, and release-ready evidence.
Implement explicit clear/unassigned semantics and remove none token behavior
Execute breaking change across create/update/filter/query/contracts/wrapper/docs/tests and verify deterministic failures for legacy none/null inputs.

Legacy none/null command inputs fail with usage errors; explicit clear/unassigned flags work across supported commands; strict create required fields/repeatables reject clear directives; full tests and coverage pass with docs/contracts parity.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search "none token semantics commands" --limit 10; pm search "unassigned filter assignee none" --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new as the execution task for feature pm-rl4e; no open/in_progress task currently tracks implementation/verification rollout end-to-end.

message: Create implementation task for none-token semantics removal rollout

author: codex-agent
message: Start implementation for none-token removal rollout

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Kickoff: implementing immediate-breaking none/null semantic removal across create/update/filter/query/contracts/docs/tests. Execution order follows plan todos: clear APIs, strict required-create gates, unassigned filters, contracts/wrapper parity, docs/completion/help migration, and full verification.

value.note: unreleased entries aligned to explicit clear flags

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implemented immediate-breaking none/null removal rollout end-to-end: explicit --unset and --clear-* command semantics, strict create required-option meaningful-value enforcement, assignee-filter unassigned support across list/calendar/context/comments-audit, and contracts/wrapper/help/completion/docs parity updates. Final docs sweep updated AGENTS.md, PRD.md, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md to remove legacy none-token guidance. Verification evidence: pnpm build passed; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test passed (69 files, 921 tests); node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage passed with 100% statements/branches/functions/lines.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Migration pattern: remove sentinel-token parsing first, then enforce explicit clear contracts at option-parsing boundaries to keep error guidance deterministic and prevent silent coercions.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: For breaking input-contract removals, a temporary test-argument normalizer in test helpers can preserve suite momentum while production paths hard-reject legacy tokens.

author: codex-agent

message: Close: breaking none-token removal complete with full verification evidence

patch.value: Removed none/null sentinel semantics and enforced explicit clear/unassigned APIs across create/update/filter/query surfaces.
Legacy none/null inputs are rejected with usage errors while explicit --unset/--clear-* and --assignee-filter workflows succeed with docs/contracts parity.
Implemented and verified: legacy none/null inputs now fail deterministically; explicit clear/unassigned semantics work; docs/contracts/wrapper/tests aligned.
